name: Honey-Garlic Roasted Carrots
description: Carrots roasted until tender and caramelized, then tossed in a sticky honey-garlic butter.
recipeIngredient: 1 pound carrots, peeled and cut into even pieces
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions: Heat the oven to 425°F. Toss the carrots with the olive oil, salt, and pepper and spread in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet.
Roast 15 minutes, toss, then roast until tender and browned in spots, 15 to 20 minutes more.
Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat, add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds, then stir in the honey. Toss the roasted carrots in the honey-garlic butter and serve.
author: The Kitchn

ai.cliffNotes: Roast the carrots first to concentrate their sweetness, then glaze with honey-garlic butter off the heat so it stays glossy.
keyTips: Cut the carrots evenly so they roast at the same rate; thicker pieces stay raw in the middle.
Add the honey to the garlic butter off direct high heat so it glazes rather than burns.
